grids.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[280px_1fr] gap-0 h-screen overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(0,118,255,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(0,118,255,0.23)] transition-all duration-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm py-3 px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-foreground border-2 border-slate-100 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-200 font-semibold py-3 px-8

cards.feature: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-blue-100 transition-all duration-300 p-8 flex flex-col items-start
cards.booking: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-none hover:border-primary transition-colors p-4 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: h-12 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 transition-all bg-slate-50/50

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100
navigation.link: text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-primary transition-colors uppercase tracking-wide

hero_bg.description: High energy soccer match, use with heavy overlay for hero background

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 20px for UI, 32px for Features

sections: Hero: Split layout. Left: Typography 'PLAY LIKE A PRO', Right: Dynamic Image Grid.
Features: 3-Col Grid. Icons + Bold Text. 'Professional Padel', 'FIFA Grade Turf', 'Online Booking'.
Courts Preview: Large cards with images + 'Book Now' button overlay.
CTA: Full width 'Ready to Play?' section with blue gradient background.
landing.layout_rules: Use generous whitespace (py-24). Avoid centering text unless it is a small caption.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Login Form (Clean, White). Right: Full height Image (Building/Action) with blue overlay.
auth.style: Minimalist input fields, strong primary button.

dashboard_user.layout: Sidebar navigation (Collapsible). Main content: 'My Bookings' (Card List) + 'New Booking' (Calendar).
dashboard_user.components: Use 'Card' for booking history. Use 'Calendar' (Shadcn) for date selection. Use 'Badge' for status (Confirmed/Pending).

booking_flow.layout: Step-by-step wizard or Single Page App.
booking_flow.steps: 1. Select Sport (Visual Cards) -> 2. Select Date (Calendar) -> 3. Select Time (Grid of slots) -> 4. Confirm.
booking_flow.slot_design: Grid of buttons. Available: Green outline. Selected: Solid Blue. Booked: Grayed out.

dashboard_admin.layout: Dense data grid. Table view for bookings. Filter bar on top.
dashboard_admin.features: Quick actions to cancel/edit. Overview stats cards (Total Bookings, Revenue) at top.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors defined in this JSON.
Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css'.
Create a layout wrapper 'Layout.jsx' that handles the Navbar and Footer.
Ensure the Calendar component handles the 90min (Padel) vs 60min (Football) logic correctly.
For the Admin Dashboard, use a dense table layout with Shadcn Table component.
